bg.$description: Material 3 color used by the list component for background.

padding.$description: Material 3 dimension used by the list component for padding.

gap.$description: Material 3 dimension used by the list component for gap.

min-height.$description: Material 3 dimension used by the list component for item min height.

min-height-multiline.$description: Material 3 dimension used by the list component for item min height multiline.

padding-inline.$description: Material 3 dimension used by the list component for item padding inline.

padding-block.$description: Material 3 dimension used by the list component for item padding block.

gap.$description: Material 3 dimension used by the list component for item gap.

radius.$description: Material 3 dimension used by the list component for item radius.

divider-width.$description: Material 3 dimension used by the list component for list item divider width.

divider-color.$description: Material 3 color used by the list component for item divider color.

primary-font-size.$description: Material 3 dimension used by the list component for item primary font size.

primary-line-height.$description: Material 3 dimension used by the list component for item primary line height.

primary-font-weight.$description: Material 3 font weight used by the list component for item primary font weight.

primary-fg.$description: Material 3 color used by the list component for item primary foreground.

secondary-font-size.$description: Material 3 dimension used by the list component for item secondary font size.

secondary-line-height.$description: Material 3 dimension used by the list component for item secondary line height.

secondary-font-weight.$description: Material 3 font weight used by the list component for item secondary font weight.

secondary-fg.$description: Material 3 color used by the list component for item secondary foreground.
